chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No.D-400 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.05.2022 Syed Zaffar Ali Shah Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan AAG. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar DPG for State. *************** Mr. Mehrab Ali Bughio Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of mother of petitioner No.1 while official respondents Nos.1 to 3 file their statements; which are taken on record. In response to notice, Investigating Officer of Crime No.179/2022 of Police Station, Malir Cantt. Karachi is present. He submits the copy of statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Saba alias Sheena recorded u/s 161 Cr.P.C wherein she has stated that neither she was abducted by anyone nor she is under wrongful confinement but she has contracted marriage with her own free will with petitioner No.2 Hidayatullah without any coercion and compulsion. She has further stated that her brother, the respondent No.4 has lodged a false FIR against her husband and others. The I.O. states that he would submit a report under Section 173, Cr.P.C before the concerned Judicial Magistrate in the light of statement of petitioner No.1 for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied with the statement of the I.O. seeks disposal of this petition by directing SSP Sukkur to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Ihsan/PS
